name: mappa-eventi-viterbo
description: Project Atlas — mappa eventi per Viterbo e provincia

scripts.build: npm run build -w @atlas/core && npm run build -w @atlas/supabase-client && npm run build -w @atlas/web && npm run build -w @atlas/admin
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @atlas/core && npm run typecheck -w @atlas/supabase-client && npm run typecheck -w @atlas/web && npm run typecheck -w @atlas/admin
